# 🌌 Solar System Civilization Event - Client Pack 🚀  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZH9xnFI-Hiw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to the **Solar System Civilization Event**, an exclusive **MARCUSK Event** where you’ll embark on an interplanetary adventure!  

## 🪐 Event Overview  
In this event, you will explore and build civilizations across **three unique worlds**:  
- 🌑 **Titan** – A cold, methane-covered moon with vast, alien landscapes.  
- ❄️ **Europa** – A frozen world with hidden secrets.  
- 🔴 **Mars** – The red planet, filled with dust storms.  

Survive, expand, and compete with other players to establish the greatest civilization!  

## 🛠️ About This Modpack  
This **client-side** modpack is designed to enhance your gameplay experience while keeping compatibility with the event's official server. It includes:  
- ⚡ **Performance Boosts** – Optimized mods for smoother gameplay.  
- 🎨 **Visual & UI Improvements** – Aesthetic enhancements for a more immersive experience.  
- 📜 **Quality of Life Additions** – Useful client-side tweaks without changing core mechanics.  

## 📩 How to Join  
Want to participate? **Apply on our Discord!**  
[Join the MARCUSK Discord](https://discord.gg/marcusk) to get started.  

Prepare for liftoff, astronaut! 🚀✨
